things.name: Art Basel
things.description: World's leading contemporary art fair held annually with works by thousands of artists

things.name: Kunstmuseum Basel
things.description: Switzerland's oldest public art collection and one of the finest in Europe

things.name: Fondation Beyeler
things.description: Exceptional private art museum by Renzo Piano with Monet, Warhol and Rothko

things.name: Basel Minster
things.description: Red sandstone cathedral with two Gothic towers and the tomb of Erasmus

things.name: Rhine River
things.description: Swim with the locals across the swift-flowing Rhine using a waterproof Wickelfisch bag

things.name: Old Town (Altstadt)
things.description: Charming medieval centre with the Renaissance town hall and Barfusserplatz

things.name: Tinguely Museum
things.description: Museum of kinetic sculptor Jean Tinguely on the banks of the Rhine

things.name: Basel Zoo (Zolli)
things.description: One of Switzerland's most popular attractions with gorillas and pygmy hippos

things.name: Paper Mill Museum
things.description: Living museum in a 15th-century paper mill with demonstrations on the riverside

things.name: Basel Carnival (Fasnacht)
things.description: Switzerland's largest carnival with lantern processions and masked costumes
